message:
test(termwiz,escape-parser): add 61 tests for input encoding/parsing and sixel builder

- input.rs: 44 new tests covering normalize_shift_to_upper_case, is_modifier,
  is_ambiguous_ascii_ctrl, is_ascii, KeyboardEncoding, encode edge cases
  (backspace, enter, escape, arrows, F-keys, modifiers, CSI-u mode),
  type equality (KeyEvent, MouseEvent, PixelMouseEvent, InputEvent),
  and parse edge cases (empty, single escape, bracketed paste, F1-F4, Home/End)
- sixel.rs: 17 new tests covering SixelBuilder construction (pan values,
  transparency, grid size), push operations (data bytes, CR, NL, repeat),
  color definitions (RGB, HSL), raster attributes, overflow protection,
  multi-digit params, command sequences, and max-params overflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
